creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
I propose to close this PR, for several reasons:

* The current devel/libusb port is sound for FreeBSD < 8.0
* For FreeBSD >= 8.0 (800069) libusb is integrated into the base system.
* The port installs libusbpp, but no dependent port uses that.
*  Installing the documentation on itself is not useful, since it only relates
    to libusb 0.1.12.  For libusb 1.0, better documentation is available online
    at http://libusb.sourceforge.net/api-1.0/
*  There are plans to write a layer for libusb20 to be (API) compatible with
    both libusb 1.0 and libusb 0.1.12
